_comment: S3 write path manifest — cross-checks CDK IAM policies against actual Lambda writes.
_convention: Default pattern is raw/matthew/{source}/* — only non-convention paths need entries here.
_how_to_use: Run tests/test_cdk_s3_paths.py. Add an entry when a Lambda deviates from convention.

todoist.reason: Todoist Lambda was built before the raw/{USER_ID}/ convention — writes to raw/todoist/ directly

dropbox.reason: Dropbox poll Lambda reads MacroFactor CSV uploads from S3 uploads/ prefix — it's a trigger path, not a raw ingest path

hevy.reason: ADR-060 / SPEC_HEVY §2.3: Hevy workouts archive to raw/hevy/{workout_id}.json (single-user platform, no user_id segment needed). Both hevy-webhook and hevy-backfill write here.
